name: byo-app
description: Mode D target for the BYO Angular+Express demo app. Used with the matching docker-compose.app.yml overlay so the app boots inside the regression network and the runner reaches it at http://byo-app:3000.
notes: The BYO app has TWO intentional bugs: the counter decrements when you click '+1', and the contact-form Submit handler is a no-op. Both shipped tests EXPECT to fail against this version. Used to demonstrate that the regression suite catches real defects. Pointed at a corrected app (fix counter.component.ts + contact.component.ts), both should pass.
